articles.title: Late call at Fenway Park leaves Rays-Red Sox postponed by Saturday rain
articles.description:
The game is scheduled to be made up as part of a split doubleheader on July 17.

The post Late call at Fenway Park leaves Rays-Red Sox postponed by Saturday rain appeared first on Boston.com.
